# DeclarativeManagementCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to enable your server to support declarative management or trigger a declarative management synchronization operation on the device.

## Declaration

```swift
object DeclarativeManagementCommand
```

## Objects

- **DeclarativeManagementCommand.Command**: The command to enable your server to support declarative management or trigger a declarative management synchronization operation on the device.

## Commands and responses

- **DeclarativeManagementResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to enable your server to support declarative management or trigger a declarative management synchronization operation on the device.
